title: Teignmouth town-centre wheelchair access map
subtitle: Conservative MCP-Geo route filter for a Quantum iLevel user. Width, slope, lighting, and pedestrian-path evidence are shown. Hover a coloured route in HTML for details. Dropped kerbs and crossing quality are not.
